raw.message: Show the world you’re the ultimate manager.

hook.summary: UGC creator juggling a soccer ball with a POV management scenario caption.
hook.visual_action: A man in a black shirt catches a soccer ball and begins juggling it with his feet and knees in a room.
hook.text_overlay: POV: you drafted the worst possible striker in Ultimate Football Manager so you take things into your own hands and play striker to win it all 🏆

scene_flow: UGC footage of a man juggling a soccer ball with a POV caption about team management.
Fast transition to the UFM 26 game logo with a green background.
UI demonstration of the player transfer market and selling star athletes like Haaland.
Final screen showing team formation tactics and app store download buttons.
on_screen_text: POV: you drafted the worst possible striker in Ultimate Football Manager so you take things into your own hands and play striker to win it all 🏆
Earn money by selling players you don't need
audience_proxy: Male football fans aged 18-35 who enjoy sports management simulations.
